programs.title: Pawn Stars
programs.desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

actor: Corey Harrison,Rick Harrison,Austin Chumlee Russell,Richard Harrison

programs.title: Kings of Restoration
programs.desc: Mark Bassett brings in a late 1800s railroad hand-car. Can Rick's skill transform this rusty wreck into a museum-quality marvel?

programs.title: Counting Cars
programs.desc: Danny is overjoyed as he gets his hands on a Plymouth Road Runner, which turns into a nightmare for Kevin. Soon, he tries to shut it down, but Danny pulls a fast one on Kevin.

programs.title: The Toys That Built The World
programs.desc: Etch A Sketch and Play-Doh were two discoveries that were made accidentally in the 1950s, which became very successful in the toy world.

programs.title: Ancient Aliens
programs.desc: Experts examine the possibility that aliens might be the reason behind the process of evolution which could be achieved by introducing viruses into the human genetic material.

actor: Robert Clotworthy,Giorgio A. Tsoukalos,Erich von Däniken,David Childress,William Henry,Linda Moulton Howe,David Wilcock,Jonathan Young,Jason Martell

programs.title: Royal India with Samira
programs.desc: The Maharaja of Jodhpur invites Samira to his wonderful palace to spend a relaxing afternoon as he opens up about various topics including food and family.
